translations.en: Indeed, whoever commits adultery with a Muslim, Jewish, Christian, or Zoroastrian woman, free or slave, and does not repent and dies persisting in it, Allah opens three hundred gates in his grave from which snakes, scorpions, and serpents of fire emerge, and he burns until the Day of Resurrection. When raised from his grave, people will flee from his stench, and he will be known by that until he is sent to the Fire. Indeed, Allah has forbidden what is forbidden and set the limits, and none is more jealous than Allah — from His jealousy He forbade immoral acts. He prohibited peeping into a neighbor's house, and said: 'Whoever intentionally looks at his Muslim brother's or a stranger's private parts, Allah will include him among the hypocrites who searched for Muslims' faults, and will not leave this world without being exposed, unless he repents.' He (peace be upon him and his family) said: 'Whoever is not content with what Allah allotted him, broadcasts complaints, and does not exercise patience, no good deed will be raised for him, and he will meet Allah while He is angry, unless he repents.' He prohibited strutting while walking, and said: 'Whoever wears a garment and struts in it, Allah will plunge him from the edge of Hell — he will be Qarun's companion, for he was the first to strut, and Allah caused him and his house to be swallowed by the earth. Whoever struts has challenged Allah in His might.' He (peace be upon him and his family) said: 'Whoever withholds a woman's dowry is considered by Allah as an adulterer. Allah will say on the Day of Resurrection: My servant, I married you to My maidservant upon My covenant, but you did not fulfill it and oppressed her. So her right will be taken from his good deeds. If he has none, he will be sent to the Fire for breaking the covenant — surely the covenant will be questioned [17:34].'
